items.title: SoundCloud acquires decentralized music platform Nina Protocol months after its shutdown
items.summary: SoundCloud has acquired decentralized music platform Nina Protocol, months after the startup announced it would shut down. The deal brings Nina’s artists, editorial archive, and...
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: EU gives Paramount's Warner Bros. acquisition the go-ahead
items.summary: As long as Paramount ends its distribution business with Universal, it can purchase Warner Bros. Discovery in Europe.

items.title: ‘The Odyssey’ Is Inspiring Unprecedented Levels of Cope
items.summary: Elon Musk and the online right convinced themselves that Christopher Nolan’s “woke” epic would go down in flames. Now they’re crashing out.
